website.title: Markus Sieger takes the helm as President ad interim at Medicines for Europe
website.detail: Markus Sieger from Polpharma assumes the role of President ad interim at Medicines for Europe, an industry association.

website.title: Polpharma Group Supports Urgent EU Action to Safeguard Access to Medicines and Strengthen European Pharmaceutical Sovereignty
website.detail: Polpharma Group advocates for urgent EU action to ensure access to medicines and enhance European pharmaceutical independence.

website.title: Polpharma Group Joins the Call to Action to Finalize Pharmaceutical Reform and Secure Early and Sustainable Healthcare for European Patients
website.detail: Polpharma Group joins an industry initiative urging the finalization of pharmaceutical reform to ensure early and sustainable healthcare for European patients.

website.title: Polpharma turns 90 years old!
website.detail: Polpharma celebrates its 90th anniversary as a pharmaceutical company.

website.title: Polpharma Receives Grants for Research Projects
website.detail: Polpharma secured grants to fund its ongoing research projects.

website.title: Alvotech Meets Investors and Participates in a Fireside Chat at the Morgan Stanley 23rd Annual Global Healthcare Conference in New York
website.detail: Alvotech engaged with investors and participated in a fireside chat at the Morgan Stanley Global Healthcare Conference in New York.

website.title: Advanz Pharma and Alvotech receive European approval for Mynzepli®, Biosimilar to Eylea®
website.detail: Advanz Pharma and Alvotech received European approval for Mynzepli®, a biosimilar to Eylea® (aflibercept).

website.title: Alvotech appoints Patrik Ling as VP of Investor Relations Scandinavia
website.detail: Alvotech appointed Patrik Ling as the Vice President of Investor Relations for the Scandinavia region.

website.title: Alvotech Reports Results for the First Six Months of 2025 and Provides a Business Update
website.detail: Alvotech reported its financial results for the first six months of 2025 and provided an update on its business operations.

website.title: Alvotech Announces Webcast to Report Financial Results for the First Half of 2025 on August 14, 2025, at 8:00 am EDT
website.detail: Alvotech announced a webcast to report its financial results for the first half of 2025 on August 14, 2025.

website.title: JUMPstart Clinical Nutrition Award winner announced at ESPEN congress
website.description: Dr. Hannah Wozniak receives €250,000 JUMPstart Clinical Nutrition research award for a personalized nutrition and early mobilization trial in ventilated patients.
website.detail: Dr. Hannah Wozniak received the €250,000 JUMPstart Clinical Nutrition research award for a personalized nutrition and early mobilization trial in ventilated patients, supported by Fresenius Kabi.

website.title: Fresenius continues streamlining its operations with the divestment of the Calea homecare business in Canada
website.description: Fresenius continues to reduce complexity and increase efficiency in its global network. In line with #FutureFresenius, the company announces the divestment of Fresenius Kabi’s Calea homecare business in Canada.
website.detail: Fresenius divested its Calea homecare business in Canada as part of its ongoing efforts to streamline operations and increase efficiency.

website.title: Fresenius Leads New EASYGEN Consortium Aimed at Decentralizing CAR-T Cell Therapy and Improving Hospital Workflows
website.description: Fresenius is collaborating with other companies and academic institutions with the goals of accelerating the manufacturing of CAR-T cell therapy, making it more cost-effective, and improving patient access across Europe.
website.detail: Fresenius is leading the new EASYGEN Consortium, collaborating with partners to decentralize CAR-T cell therapy and improve hospital workflows, aiming for faster, more cost-effective manufacturing and better patient access.

website.title: Fresenius Q2/25: Guidance raised - Resilient business continues to deliver consistent performance
website.description: Q2/2025: Ongoing strong revenue and EPS growth, guidance for organic revenue growth raised
website.detail: Fresenius reported strong Q2 2025 results, showing ongoing revenue and EPS growth, leading to a raised guidance for organic revenue growth.

website.title: Fresenius Announces Licensing Agreement with Polpharma Biologics to Commercialize a Proposed Vedolizumab Biosimilar
website.description: Fresenius Kabi will exclusively commercialize Polpharma Biologics’ vedolizumab biosimilar candidate PB016 globally (except in the Middle East and North Africa).
website.detail: Fresenius announced an exclusive global licensing agreement (excluding MENA) with Polpharma Biologics to commercialize their vedolizumab biosimilar candidate PB016.

website.title: Dr. Reddy’s strengthens its CNS Portfolio by foraying into anti-vertigo segment with acquisition of STUGERON®
website.detail: Dr. Reddy's strengthened its CNS portfolio by acquiring STUGERON® to enter the anti-vertigo segment.

website.title: Dr. Reddy's launches Linaclotide (Colozo®) a novel drug for Chronic Constipation management in adults, in India.
website.detail: Dr. Reddy's launched Linaclotide (Colozo®) in India, a novel drug for the management of chronic constipation in adults.

website.title: Dr. Reddy’s Q1FY26 Financial Results
website.detail: Dr. Reddy's announced its financial results for the first quarter of fiscal year 2026.

website.title: Alvotech and Dr. Reddy’s Enter into Collaboration to Co-Develop Biosimilar Candidate to Keytruda® (pembrolizumab)
website.detail: Alvotech and Dr. Reddy's entered into a collaboration agreement to co-develop a biosimilar candidate to Keytruda® (pembrolizumab).

website.title: Dr. Reddy’s Q4 & full year FY25 Financial Results
website.detail: Dr. Reddy's released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year 2025.

google_news.title: Dr. Reddy’s Laboratories Receives USFDA Observations Post-Inspection
google_news.detail: Dr. Reddy’s Laboratories received observations from the USFDA following a recent inspection.

website.title: FDA approves expanded indication for AVTOZMA® (tocilizumab-anoh) intravenous (IV) formulation in cytokine release syndrome (CRS)
website.detail: The FDA approved an expanded indication for Celltrion's AVTOZMA® (tocilizumab-anoh) intravenous formulation for cytokine release syndrome (CRS).

website.title: Celltrion USA announces U.S. launch of denosumab biosimilars, STOBOCLO® and OSENVELT® (denosumab-bmwo)
website.detail: Celltrion USA announced the U.S. launch of its denosumab biosimilars, STOBOCLO® and OSENVELT® (denosumab-bmwo).

website.title: Celltrion announces U.S. FDA approval of additional presentation of STEQEYMA® (ustekinumab-stba), expanding dosing options for pediatric patients
website.detail: Celltrion announced U.S. FDA approval for an additional presentation of STEQEYMA® (ustekinumab-stba), expanding dosing options for pediatric patients.

website.title: Celltrion's YUFLYMA® (adalimumab-aaty) receives FDA interchangeability designation for all its approved dosage forms and strengths
website.detail: Celltrion's YUFLYMA® (adalimumab-aaty) received FDA interchangeability designation for all its approved dosage forms and strengths.

website.title: Celltrion to present six abstracts in inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) at 2025 Digestive Disease Week® (DDW)
website.detail: Celltrion is slated to present six abstracts related to inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) at the 2025 Digestive Disease Week® (DDW).

website.title: Celltrion's STEQEYMA® (ustekinumab-stba), now added to the Costco Member Prescription Program
website.detail: Celltrion's STEQEYMA® (ustekinumab-stba) has been added to the Costco Member Prescription Program, enhancing patient access.

website.title: STEQEYMA® (ustekinumab-stba), a biosimilar to STELARA® (ustekinumab), now available in the United States
website.detail: STEQEYMA® (ustekinumab-stba), Celltrion's biosimilar referencing STELARA®, is now available in the United States.

website.title: U.S. FDA approves Celltrion's OMLYCLO® (omalizumab-igec) as the first and only biosimilar with interchangeability designation referencing XOLAIR®
website.detail: The U.S. FDA approved Celltrion's OMLYCLO® (omalizumab-igec) as the first and only biosimilar with interchangeability designation referencing XOLAIR®.

website.title: Celltrion receives U.S. FDA approval for STOBOCLO® (denosumab-bmwo) and OSENVELT® (denosumab-bmwo) biosimilars referencing PROLIA® and XGEVA®
website.detail: Celltrion received U.S. FDA approval for its denosumab biosimilars, STOBOCLO® and OSENVELT®, referencing PROLIA® and XGEVA®.

website.title: Samsung Biologics reports second quarter 2025 financial results
website.summary: Incheon, S. Korea, July 23, 2025 – Samsung Biologics (KRX: 207940.KS), a leading contract development and manufacturing organization (CDMO), today announced its financial results for the second quarte
website.detail: Samsung Biologics announced its financial results for the second quarter of 2025.

website.summary: Samsung Biologics, a leading contract development and manufacturing organization (CDMO), today announced the launch of Samsung Organoids – advanced drug screening services to support clients in drug d
website.detail: Samsung Biologics launched Samsung Organoids, a new advanced drug screening service for its clients.

website.title: Samsung Biologics reports first quarter 2025 financial results
website.summary: Incheon, S. Korea, April 23, 2025 – Samsung Biologics (KRX: 207940.KS), a global contract development and manufacturing organization (CDMO), today announced financial results for the first quarter of
website.detail: Samsung Biologics announced its financial results for the first quarter of 2025.

website.title: Samsung Biologics recognized for leadership in water security
website.summary: Samsung Biologics, a global contract manufacturing and development organization (CDMO), today announced that it has received ‘Leadership’ status and an A- rating for water security from the Carbon Dis
website.detail: Samsung Biologics received 'Leadership' status and an A- rating for water security from the Carbon Disclosure Project.

website.title: Samsung Biologics reports fourth quarter and fiscal year 2024 financial results
website.summary: Incheon, S. Korea, Jan 22, 2025– Samsung Biologics, a global contract development and manufacturing organization (CDMO), today announced financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2024.
website.detail: Samsung Biologics reported its financial results for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year 2024.

website.title: Samsung Biologics presents business updates at 2025 J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference
website.summary: Samsung Biologics, a global contract development and manufacturing organization (CDMO), today announced its latest business achievements and 2025 outlook at the 43rd J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference
website.detail: Samsung Biologics presented its latest business updates and 2025 outlook at the J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference.

website.title: Samsung Biologics extends collaboration with LigaChem Biosciences for ADC development
website.summary: Incheon, S. Korea, January 9, 2025 – Samsung Biologics (KRX: 207940.KS), a global contract development and manufacturing organization (CDMO), today announced to extend collaboration with LigaChem Bios
website.detail: Samsung Biologics extended its collaboration with LigaChem Biosciences for antibody-drug conjugate (ADC) development.

website.title: Samsung Biologics listed among top most sustainable companies in Dow Jones Sustainability World Index
website.summary: Incheon, S. Korea, December 17, 2024 – Samsung Biologics (KRX: 207940.KS), a global contract development and manufacturing organization (CDMO), today announced its continued recognition by the Dow Jon
website.detail: Samsung Biologics was recognized among the top most sustainable companies in the Dow Jones Sustainability World Index.

website.summary: Incheon, Korea, December 3, 2024 – Samsung Biologics (KRX: 207940.KS), a global contract development and manufacturing organization (CDMO), today hosted its second Supplier ESG Day to share insights o
website.detail: Samsung Biologics hosted its second Supplier ESG Day to strengthen decarbonization efforts with its suppliers.

website.summary: Incheon, S. Korea, November 20, 2024 – Samsung Biologics (KRX: 207940.KS), a global contract development and manufacturing organization (CDMO), today announced a series of manufacturing deals with a E
website.detail: Samsung Biologics signed a series of manufacturing deals with a European pharmaceutical company.

google_news.title: Samsung Biologics, Amgen and Biocon invest in US pharma sites
google_news.detail: Samsung Biologics, alongside Amgen and Biocon, is investing in US pharmaceutical manufacturing sites.

website.title: Sandoz reaches agreement with Regeneron, resolving all patent litigation related to its US aflibercept biosimilar
website.detail: Sandoz reached an agreement with Regeneron, resolving all patent litigation concerning its US aflibercept biosimilar.

website.title: Sandoz launches rivaroxaban in Germany, expanding access to high-quality antithrombotic treatment options
website.detail: Sandoz launched rivaroxaban in Germany, expanding access to high-quality antithrombotic treatment options.

website.title: Sandoz launches renewable energy partnership to cover nearly 90% of electricity demand for European operations
website.detail: Sandoz launched a renewable energy partnership aimed at covering nearly 90% of its European operations' electricity demand.

website.title: Sandoz delivers strong H1 2025 results, with accelerated sales growth in the second quarter
website.detail: Sandoz reported strong H1 2025 results, demonstrating accelerated sales growth in the second quarter.

website.title: Sandoz signs non-binding term sheet with Evotec SE to acquire its Just-Evotec Biologics in-house development and manufacturing capabilities in Toulouse, France
website.detail: Sandoz signed a non-binding term sheet with Evotec SE to acquire its Just-Evotec Biologics in-house development and manufacturing capabilities in Toulouse, France.

website.title: Sandoz further asserts leadership in biosimilars, breaking ground on new Slovenia facility to expand European biosimilar hub and global market reach
website.detail: Sandoz broke ground on a new facility in Slovenia to expand its European biosimilar hub and global market reach, reinforcing its leadership in biosimilars.

website.title: Sandoz launches first and only interchangeable denosumab biosimilars in US, providing new affordable treatment options for over 10 million patients[1]
website.detail: Sandoz launched the first and only interchangeable denosumab biosimilars in the US, offering new affordable treatment options for over 10 million patients.

website.title: Sandoz launches Pyzchiva® autoinjector, first commercially available in Europe for ustekinumab biosimilars
website.detail: Sandoz launched the Pyzchiva® autoinjector, which is the first commercially available in Europe for ustekinumab biosimilars.

website.title: Sandoz reports Q1 2025 net sales in line with company expectations; full-year guidance confirmed
website.detail: Sandoz reported Q1 2025 net sales that met company expectations and confirmed its full-year guidance.

website.title: Sandoz enters global collaboration license agreement with Henlius to commercialize leading oncology therapy, ipilimumab, in multiple indications
website.detail: Sandoz entered a global collaboration and license agreement with Henlius to commercialize the oncology therapy ipilimumab in multiple indications.

website.title: Biocon Foundation Supports Government High School, Kicks off Construction of a New Building for 250 Students
website.detail: Biocon Foundation initiated the construction of a new building to support a government high school with 250 students.

website.title: Biocon Inaugurates First U.S. Manufacturing Facility in Cranbury, New Jersey
website.detail: Biocon inaugurated its first U.S. manufacturing facility, located in Cranbury, New Jersey.

website.title: Biocon Q1FY26 Operating Revenue at Rs 3,942 Cr, Up 15%
website.detail: Biocon reported Q1 FY26 operating revenue of Rs 3,942 Cr, marking a 15% increase.

website.title: Biocon Foundation and IISc Commemorate World Head & Neck Cancer Day
website.detail: Biocon Foundation collaborated with IISc to commemorate World Head & Neck Cancer Day.

website.title: Deepali Naair Appointed as the Global Head – Brand & Corporate Communications at Biocon Biologics
website.detail: Deepali Naair was appointed as the Global Head – Brand & Corporate Communications at Biocon Biologics.

website.title: Biocon Biologics Expands Diabetes Portfolio with FDA Approval of Kirsty™, the First and Only Interchangeable Rapid-Acting Insulin Aspart in the United States
website.detail: Biocon Biologics received FDA approval for Kirsty™, the first and only interchangeable rapid-acting insulin aspart in the United States, expanding its diabetes portfolio.

website.title: Advancing Bone Health: European Commission Approves Biocon Biologics’ Denosumab Biosimilars
website.detail: The European Commission approved Biocon Biologics’ denosumab biosimilars, aiming to advance bone health treatment options.

website.title: Biocon Biologics Expands Insulin Access in Malaysia
website.detail: Biocon Biologics expanded insulin access in Malaysia.

website.title: Biocon Biologics Receives Health Canada Approval for Yesafili™ (aflibercept); First Global Launch Scheduled for July 2025
website.detail: Biocon Biologics received Health Canada approval for Yesafili™ (aflibercept), with its first global launch scheduled for July 2025.

website.title: Biocon Biologics Collaborates with National Cancer Society Malaysia
website.detail: Biocon Biologics collaborated with the National Cancer Society Malaysia.

google_news.title: Samsung Biologics, Amgen and Biocon invest in US pharma sites
google_news.detail: Biocon, along with Samsung Biologics and Amgen, is investing in US pharmaceutical manufacturing sites.

google_news.title: BioWISE 2025 – Call for Applications Open | Scholarship and Mentorship Programme for Women in STEM
google_news.detail: The BioWISE 2025 scholarship and mentorship program for women in STEM, supported by Biocon, opened its call for applications.
